title: How to Define a Target Audience: A Product Manager's Tactical Guide

title: How target audience, ICP, and personas guide PMM strategies
snippet: Lead multi-disciplinary workshops with marketing, sales, product, and customer success to create alignment and validate your target audience, ICP, and personas.

title: Identifying Target Audience as a Product Manager
snippet: Identifying the target audience is a critical aspect of product management that directly impacts the success of a product. Understanding the needs, preferences, and behaviors of the target audience is essential for product managers to develop products that resonate with customers and drive business growth.
